sent_simp: 首批志愿者已经抵达灾区。
sent_trad: 首批志願者已經抵達災區。
english: The first batch of volunteers has already arrived in the disaster area.
The child was crying and wanting milk to drink.

pinyin: Tā yǒu yī zhāng rú huā de xiàoliǎn.
english: She has a smile as radiant as flowers.

sent_simp: 他花了三年时间整理这批史料。
sent_trad: 他花了三年時間整理這批史料。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shíjiān zhěnglǐ zhè pī shǐliào.
english: He spent three years organizing this collection of historical materials.

sent_simp: 把蔬菜放入锅中煮五分钟。
sent_trad: 把蔬菜放入鍋中煮五分鐘。
pinyin: Bǎ shūcài fàngrù guō zhōng zhǔ wǔ fēnzhōng.
english: Put the vegetables into the pot and cook for five minutes.

sent_simp: 一名警员正在路口指挥交通。
sent_trad: 一名警員正在路口指揮交通。
pinyin: Yī míng jǐngyuán zhèngzài lùkǒu zhǐhuī jiāotōng.
english: A police officer is directing traffic at the intersection.

sent_simp: 他气得直骂那个狗东西。
sent_trad: 他氣得直罵那個狗東西。
pinyin: Tā qì de zhí mà nàge gǒudōngxi.
english: He was so angry he kept cursing that scoundrel.

sent_simp: 协会在各城市设立了分会。
sent_trad: 協會在各城市設立了分會。
pinyin: Xiéhuì zài gè chéngshì shèlì le fēnhuì.
english: The association has set up branches in various cities.

sent_simp: 这条干线每天运输大量货物。
sent_trad: 這條幹線每天運輸大量貨物。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo gànxiàn měi tiān yùnshū dàliàng huòwù.
english: This main line transports a large amount of goods every day.

sent_simp: 历史书上记载了这位相国的事迹。
sent_trad: 歷史書上記載了這位相國的事跡。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū shàng jìzǎi le zhè wèi xiàngguó de shìjì.
english: The history book records the deeds of this prime minister.

sent_simp: 他第一次去听歌剧，觉得非常震撼。
sent_trad: 他第一次去聽歌劇，覺得非常震撼。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì qù tīng gējù, juéde fēicháng zhènhàn.
english: He went to hear an opera for the first time and found it incredibly moving.

sent_simp: 搬家之后我们还是经常来往。
sent_trad: 搬家之後我們還是經常來往。
pinyin: Bānjiā zhīhòu wǒmen háishi jīngcháng láiwǎng.
english: Even after moving, we still keep in regular contact with each other.

sent_simp: 今天会议的议程已经发给大家了。
sent_trad: 今天會議的議程已經發給大家了。
pinyin: Jīntiān huìyì de yìchéng yǐjīng fā gěi dàjiā le.
english: Today's meeting agenda has already been sent to everyone.

sent_simp: 他分享了对新项目的初步构想。
sent_trad: 他分享了對新項目的初步構想。
pinyin: Tā fēnxiǎng le duì xīn xiàngmù de chūbù gòuxiǎng.
english: He shared his initial concept for the new project.

sent_simp: 他在采访中抨击了这项不公平的政策。
sent_trad: 他在採訪中抨擊了這項不公平的政策。
pinyin: Tā zài cǎifǎng zhōng pēngjī le zhè xiàng bù gōngpíng de zhèngcè.
english: He criticized this unfair policy in an interview.
